description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden storage box constructed from horizontal planks with visible wood grain and knots, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The box features diagonal wooden braces on its sides for added structural support, and metal fasteners are visible at the corners. There are two adhesive labels with Cyrillic writing, one on the top and one on the side, suggesting it may be used for shipping or storage in an industrial or urban setting. The wood appears weathered, indicating outdoor or heavy-duty use. The box has no visible handles or locking mechanisms, and the lid is flush with the top surface, likely removable. Its robust build and size make it suitable for placement in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage box with diagonal braces, visible wood grain, and adhesive labels in Cyrillic script. It is sturdy, rustic, and suitable for industrial or outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wooden planks, diagonal brace, and a label with Cyrillic writing on the top and side.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the diagonal brace and the top label, with the wood grain and fasteners clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain wooden planks and fasteners, with no labels or braces visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the diagonal brace and the top label, with a more uniform wood grain and no side label.
